name: Premium Energy Corp.
summary: Premium Energy Corp. operates in the exploration and development of oil and gas reserves in the western Canadian sedimentary basin. It has interests in the Boyne Lake Gas Project covering 11,520 acres of Crown Oil Sand licences located in Bonneyville, Alberta. The company was formerly known as Premium Petroleum Corp. and changed its name to Premium Energy Corp. in February 2013. Premium Energy Corp. is based in Calgary, Canada.
